transcript: Speaker A: Nenu vellutunnanu. [I'm going.] Speaker B: I'm going. Speaker A: Nenu vellabotunnanu. [I'm about to leave.] Speaker B: I'm about to leave. Speaker A: Nenu konchem sepatlo velthanu. [I'll leave shortly.] Speaker B: I'll leave shortly. Speaker A: Nenu mundugane vellipoyanu. [I've already gone.] Speaker B: I've already gone. Speaker A: Nenu rojoo akkadiki velthanu. [I go there every day.] Speaker B: I go there every day. Speaker A: Arey idi chaala easy ga undi. [Hey, this is very easy.] Speaker B: Avunu, English nerchukovadam chaala easy. Ilanti practice chestu unte chaalu, rendu varallo nee English first class aipotundi. [Yes, learning English is very easy. Just practicing like this is enough, your English will become first class in two weeks.] Speaker A: Idi nenu ekkada cheyyagalanu? [Where can I do this?] Speaker B: Neevu SpeakX app download cheyyali. Indulo nanti AI English teachers judgement lekunda English practice cheyinchutaru. [You should download the SpeakX app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment.] Nee English chaala fluent aipotundi. Ventane SpeakX download cheyyi mariyu rendu varallo nee English tho andarini impress cheyyi. [Your English will become very fluent. Download SpeakX immediately and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
on_screen_text: Nenu vellutunnanu [I'm going], I'm going, Nenu vellabotunnanu [I'm about to leave], I'm about to leave, Nenu konchem sepatlo velthanu [I'll leave shortly], I'll leave shortly, Nenu mundugane vellipoyanu [I've already gone], I've already gone, Nenu rojoo akkadiki velthanu [I go there every day], I go there every day, Arey idi chaala easy ga undi [Hey, this is very easy], Neevu SpeakX [You SpeakX], AI English teachers, judgement lekunda [without judgment], English practice
summary: A split-screen demonstration showing a human practicing English translation with an AI avatar. The AI avatar explains that learning English is easy with daily practice and promotes the SpeakX app for judgment-free learning. The call to action encourages downloading the app to achieve fluency in two weeks.
